questions.question: The conservationist ---- the migration patterns of the monarch butterfly for nearly eight years when she finally ---- enough data to publish a landmark study.

feedback.hint: 'For nearly eight years when she finally accumulated' → süreç + referans noktası.
feedback.logic: Sekiz yıllık takip süreci, veri birikiminden önce devam ediyordu → Past Perfect Continuous: 'had been tracking'. Veri birikimi anlık tamamlanmış eylem → Simple Past: 'accumulated'.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'had tracked' diyerek süreç vurgusunu kaybeder; 'for nearly eight years' süreklilik işaret eder → Continuous gerekli.

questions.question: Urban cycling rates ---- steadily since the city ---- protected bike lanes across its main arteries three years ago.

feedback.hint: 'Since the city installed' → başlangıç noktası + bugüne uzanan artış.
feedback.logic: 'Since + Simple Past (installed)' başlangıç noktası. Bugüne uzanan artış süreci → Present Perfect Continuous: 'have been rising'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'have risen / had installed' diyerek kurulumu Past Perfect yapar; 'since' başlangıç noktasını Simple Past'ta bırakır — 'had installed' yanlış.

questions.question: By the time the documentary premieres next autumn, the filmmakers ---- on the project for nearly four years and ---- over sixty countries.
options: A) will have been working / will have visited
C) have been working / have visited
D) will have been working / will visit
E) will work / will have visited

feedback.hint: 'By the time it premieres next autumn' → gelecek referans noktasına kadar iki tamamlanmış süreç.
feedback.logic: 'By the time + Simple Present' → Future Perfect Continuous: 'will have been working' (süreç vurgulu). Ziyaret de o noktaya kadar tamamlanmış → Future Perfect: 'will have visited'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'will visit' diyerek Simple Future kullanır; 'by the time' + tamamlanma vurgusu → Future Perfect gerektirir.

questions.question: Neuroscientists maintain that the adolescent brain ---- not fully ---- until the mid-twenties, a finding that ---- significant implications for legal and educational policy.

feedback.hint: Genel bilimsel gerçek. 'Does not fully mature' → Simple Present negative. 'Carries implications' → genel gerçek.
feedback.logic: 'Maintain that' + genel bilimsel gerçek → Simple Present: 'does not fully mature / carries'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'has matured' diyerek Present Perfect kullanır; genel bilimsel gerçek Simple Present ile ifade edilir — 'has matured' belirli bir süreye bağlar.

questions.question: The photograph ---- in a shoebox for decades before a historian ---- it and recognised its significance to the civil rights movement.

feedback.hint: 'For decades before a historian discovered it' → süreç + referans noktası.
feedback.logic: On yıllarca devam eden durum, keşiften önce → Past Perfect Continuous: 'had been lying'. Keşif anlık olay → Simple Past: 'discovered'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'had lain / had discovered' diyerek keşfi de Past Perfect yapar; keşif referans noktasıdır, ondan önce değil — Simple Past gerekli.

questions.question: I ---- about applying for the gap year programme for months, and by this time next week, I ---- my final decision.
options: A) have been thinking / will have made
D) have been thinking / will make

feedback.hint: 'For months' → süreç. 'By this time next week' → gelecekte tamamlanmış.
feedback.logic: 'For months' → Present Perfect Continuous: 'have been thinking'. 'By this time next week' → Future Perfect: 'will have made'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'will make' diyerek Simple Future kullanır; 'by this time next week' tamamlanmış karar gerektirir → Future Perfect.

questions.question: The social enterprise ---- significant momentum in its early stages but ---- to attract institutional investment due to its unconventional business model.
options: A) gained / has continued to struggle
B) has gained / continued to struggle
D) was gaining / continues to struggle
E) gained / had continued to struggle

feedback.hint: İvme geçmişte kazanıldı. Kurumsal yatırım çekme mücadelesi → hâlâ devam ediyor mu?
feedback.logic: 'Gained momentum in its early stages' → geçmişte tamamlanmış → Simple Past. 'Has continued to struggle' → geçmişten bugüne devam eden mücadele → Present Perfect.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'continued to struggle' diyerek Simple Past kullanır; mücadele hâlâ devam ediyorsa Present Perfect daha uygun.

questions.question: As the closing credits ---- across the screen, the director ---- that this would be his final film.

feedback.hint: 'As' → arka plan süregelen eylem + anlık haber.
feedback.logic: 'As the credits were rolling' → arka plan devam eden → Past Continuous. 'The director announced' → içine giren anlık haber → Simple Past.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'rolled / announced' diyerek her ikisini de Simple Past yapar; 'as' eş zamanlılık vurgular — arka plan için Past Continuous gerekli.

questions.question: The teen activist ---- her online platform for two years now, and her follower count ---- more than tenfold since she launched her first campaign.
options: A) has been running / has grown
C) has run / has been growing

feedback.hint: 'For two years now' → süreç. 'Since she launched' + büyüme → birikimsel sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'For two years now' → Present Perfect Continuous: 'has been running'. 'Since she launched / more than tenfold' → tamamlanmış birikimsel büyüme → Present Perfect: 'has grown'.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'grew' diyerek Simple Past kullanır; 'since she launched' bugüne uzanan büyüme → Present Perfect gerekli.

questions.question: The ancient trade route ---- for centuries before it ---- abandoned as maritime alternatives ---- more economically viable.
options: A) had been in operation / was / became
B) was in operation / had been abandoned / became
C) had been operating / abandoned / has become
D) operated / was abandoned / had become
E) had been in operation / was abandoned / had become

feedback.hint: Üç eylem kronolojisi: işletim → terk → deniz yolu daha uygun oldu. Sıraya dikkat.
feedback.logic: İşletim süreci terk etmeden önce → Past Perfect: 'had been in operation'. Terk edilme → Simple Past Passive: 'was abandoned'. Deniz yolunun uygun hale gelmesi → aynı dönemde → Simple Past: 'became'.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'had become' diyerek deniz yolunun uygun hale gelmesini terk edilmeden önce başlatır; ikisi eş zamanlı veya 'became' neden olarak önceydi — Simple Past daha tutarlı.

questions.question: The bridge ---- inspected annually under national safety regulations; failure to comply ---- in the immediate suspension of the structure's operating licence.
options: D) has to be / may result
E) ought to be / will result

feedback.hint: Ulusal güvenlik düzenlemesi → kesin zorunluluk. Uyumsuzluk → kesin yaptırım politikası.
feedback.logic: 'Must be inspected' = yasal zorunluluk (pasif). 'Will result in suspension' = kesin politika yaptırımı.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'would result' diyerek hipotetik kullanım yapar; uyumsuzluğun sonucu kesin kural — 'will result' gerekli.

questions.question: The concert tickets ---- sold out within minutes; the organisers ---- anticipated such overwhelming demand.
options: A) appear to have / cannot have
B) seem to have / could not have
C) appear to have / must not have
D) seem to / should not have
E) appear to have / would not have

feedback.hint: 'Appear / seem to have sold out' → geçmişe yönelik görünüş. 'Could not have anticipated' → geçmişte mümkün değildi.
feedback.logic: 'Seem to have sold out' = perfect infinitive (geçmişte gerçekleşmiş). 'Could not have anticipated' = geçmişte bu talebi öngörmenin imkânsız olduğu → güçlü olumsuz geçmiş çıkarım.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'cannot have anticipated' diyerek şimdiki zaman modal kullanır; geçmiş olasılık için 'could not have' + past participle gerekli.

questions.question: Young people ---- critically assess the sources of information they encounter online; digital literacy ---- considered a core life skill in the twenty-first century.

feedback.hint: Ahlaki tavsiye tonu. 'Increasingly considered' → günümüzdeki eğilim.
feedback.logic: 'Ought to critically assess' = ahlaki tavsiye/öneri. 'Is increasingly considered a core skill' = günümüzdeki eğilim → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'must' diyerek kesin zorunluluk bildirir; 'ought to' daha yumuşak ahlaki öneri için akademik bağlamda tercih edilir.

questions.question: She ---- the audition; her months of dedicated practice ---- in a flawless performance that left the panel visibly impressed.
options: B) should have aced / has culminated
C) must have aced / has culminated
E) must have aced / would culminate

feedback.hint: Panel etkilendi → güçlü geçmiş çıkarım. Aylarca süren pratik → sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'Must have aced' = kanıta dayalı güçlü geçmiş çıkarım (panel etkilendi). 'Culminated in a flawless performance' = geçmişte tamamlanmış sonuç → Simple Past.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'has culminated' diyerek Present Perfect kullanır; dinleme geçmişte tek bir olaydı — Simple Past gerekli.

questions.question: You ---- all the chapters in chronological order; ---- you begin with the thematic analysis in Chapter Four, the argument will be far clearer.
options: B) don't have to read / If

feedback.hint: 'Need not read' → zorunluluk yok. 'Should you begin' → inversion Type 1.
feedback.logic: 'Need not read all chapters in order' = zorunluluk yok. 'Should you begin with Chapter Four' = Type 1 inverted conditional (Should inversion).
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'need not / If' diyerek Type 1 inversion yerine düz koşul kullanır; 'should you begin' inversion yapısı daha akademik ve vurgulu.

questions.question: The data ---- be treated with extreme caution, as the sample size is too small ---- any firm conclusions.
options: E) has to / to be drawn

feedback.hint: Araştırma metodolojisi uyarısı → güçlü zorunluluk. 'Too small to + ...' → infinitive yapısı.
feedback.logic: 'Must be treated with caution' = güçlü metodolojik zorunluluk. 'Too small to draw any firm conclusions' = 'too + adj + to + infinitive' sabit yapı.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'for drawing' diyerek 'too... for drawing' kullanır; standart yapı 'too + adj + to + infinitive' — 'for + gerund' değil.

questions.question: The company ---- its environmental impact assessment before beginning construction; the subsequent legal challenges ---- entirely avoided.
options: A) should have conducted / could have been
C) should have conducted / would have been
D) ought to conduct / could have been
E) should have conducted / must have been

feedback.hint: Değerlendirme yapılmadı → geçmiş pişmanlık/eleştiri. Yasal sorunlar → gerçekleşmemiş geçmiş alternatif.
feedback.logic: 'Should have conducted' = geçmişte yapılması gereken ama yapılmamış. 'Could have been avoided' = mümkündü ama gerçekleşmedi — 'could have been'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'would have been avoided' diyerek Type 3 koşullu sonuç verir; 'could have been avoided' seçimlik olasılık içerir ve daha uygun — 'would have' deterministic.

questions.question: Participants in the study ---- reveal their identity unless they ---- to do so; anonymity ---- guaranteed from the outset.
options: A) were not required to / chose / was
C) did not have to / chose / has been
D) were not required to / had chosen / was

feedback.hint: Araştırma katılımcılarına geçmişteki kural. 'Unless they chose' → geçmiş koşul.
feedback.logic: 'Were not required to reveal' = geçmişteki zorunluluk yok (pasif). 'Unless they chose to do so' = koşul → Simple Past. 'Was guaranteed' = geçmişteki güvence.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'did not have to / chose / has been' diyerek 'has been guaranteed' Present Perfect kullanır; araştırma geçmişte tamamlandı — Simple Past 'was' gerekli.

questions.question: The gallery opening ---- be more spectacular; every detail ---- attended to with extraordinary care by the curatorial team.
options: A) could not have been / had been
C) could not have been / has been
E) could not have been / was

feedback.hint: 'Could not have been more spectacular' → geçmişteki üstünlük ifadesi. 'Had been attended to' → gösterimden önce.
feedback.logic: 'Could not have been more spectacular' = geçmişte bundan daha iyi olamazdı (mükemmellik vurgusu). 'Every detail had been attended to' = açılıştan önce tüm detaylara bakıldı → Past Perfect.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'has been attended' diyerek Present Perfect kullanır; galeri açılışı geçmişte tamamlandı — Past Perfect 'had been' kronolojik önceliği vurgular.

questions.question: She ---- her acceptance into the programme by now; the notification email ---- sent to all applicants yesterday.
options: C) should have received / has been

feedback.hint: 'By now' + e-posta dün gönderildi → beklenen ama henüz gerçekleşmemiş olabilecek eylem.
feedback.logic: 'Should have received by now' = beklenen ama henüz gerçekleşmemiş durum (endişe tonu). 'The email was sent yesterday' = geçmişte tamamlanmış → Simple Past.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'has been sent' diyerek 'dün' zarfıyla Present Perfect kullanır; 'yesterday' belirli geçmiş zaman → Simple Past 'was sent' gerekli.

questions.question: The composer's final symphony ---- premiered posthumously, and recordings of the performance ---- streamed over thirty million times since.

feedback.hint: 'Posthumously' → geçmişte tamamlanmış. 'Since' → geçmişten bugüne.
feedback.logic: 'Was premiered posthumously' → Simple Past Passive. 'Have been streamed since' → Present Perfect Passive (bugüne uzanan süreç).
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'were streamed' diyerek Simple Past kullanır; 'since' bugüne uzanan süreci gösterir → Present Perfect gerekli.

questions.question: The new apprenticeship scheme ---- currently ---- by three government departments, and a formal evaluation report ---- to parliament next spring.
options: A) is / being coordinated / will be presented
B) has / been coordinated / is presented
C) is / being coordinated / is presented
D) was / being coordinated / will be presented
E) is / coordinated / will have been presented

feedback.hint: 'Currently' → devam eden pasif. 'Next spring' → gelecek.
feedback.logic: 'Currently being coordinated' → Present Continuous Passive. 'Next spring' → Simple Future Passive: 'will be presented'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'is presented' diyerek Simple Present kullanır; rapor gelecekte sunulacak — 'will be presented' gerekli.

questions.question: The finalist's essay ---- to the judging panel before the shortlist ---- and the winner ---- next Thursday.
options: A) has been submitted / was announced / will be revealed
B) was submitted / was announced / will be revealed
C) has been submitted / has been announced / is revealed
D) was submitted / has been announced / will be revealed
E) has been submitted / was announced / is revealed

feedback.hint: Makale güncel haber. Kısa liste → geçmişte. Kazanan → gelecek.
feedback.logic: 'Has been submitted' → güncel eylem → Present Perfect Passive. 'Before the shortlist was announced' → geçmişte → Simple Past Passive. 'Next Thursday' → Future Passive: 'will be revealed'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'was submitted' diyerek makale teslimini de Simple Past yapar; makale yeni teslim edildi (güncel haber) → Present Perfect daha uygun.

questions.question: It ---- now ---- that prolonged social isolation in adolescence ---- measurable structural changes in regions of the brain associated with empathy.

feedback.hint: 'It is now established that' → impersonal passive. Genel bilimsel gerçek.
feedback.logic: 'It is now established that' = impersonal passive, genel kabul. 'Produces measurable structural changes' = genel bilimsel gerçek → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'has produced' diyerek Present Perfect kullanır; genel bilimsel gerçek için Simple Present tercih edilir.

questions.question: The historic theatre ---- for conversion into luxury flats before a last-minute heritage protection order ---- that prevented the demolition.
options: A) was being prepared / was issued
B) was prepared / had been issued
C) had been prepared / was issued
D) was being prepared / had been issued

feedback.hint: Hazırlık süreci devam ediyordu → koruma emri aniden çıktı. Arka plan + kesinti.
feedback.logic: 'Was being prepared for conversion' → arka plan devam eden → Past Continuous Passive. 'A heritage order was issued' → içine giren ani olay → Simple Past Passive.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'had been issued' diyerek emri hazırlık sürecinden önce başlatır; 'last-minute' anlık ve eş zamanlı bir olayı işaret eder — Simple Past gerekli.

questions.question: The experimental vaccine ---- to over a thousand volunteers before any serious side effects ---- and the trial ---- suspended pending further investigation.
options: A) had been administered / were reported / was
B) was administered / were reported / has been
C) had been administered / had been reported / was
D) was administered / had been reported / was
E) has been administered / were reported / was

feedback.hint: Üç eylem: aşı verildi (önce) → yan etkiler raporlandı (referans) → deneme durduruldu.
feedback.logic: Yan etkiler raporlanmadan önce aşı zaten uygulanmıştı → Past Perfect Passive: 'had been administered'. Yan etki raporu → Simple Past Passive: 'were reported'. Deneme durduruldu → Simple Past Passive: 'was'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'had been reported' diyerek yan etkileri de Past Perfect yapar; yan etkiler referans noktasıdır — Simple Past gerekli.

questions.question: The youth orchestra ---- invited to perform at the international festival, an opportunity that ---- once in a lifetime and ---- transformative by all who participated.
options: A) has been / comes / has been described as
B) was / came / was described as
C) has been / comes / was described as
D) is being / comes / has been described as
E) has been / comes / is described as

feedback.hint: Davet → güncel haber. 'Comes once in a lifetime' → genel gerçek. 'Described as' → güncel değerlendirme.
feedback.logic: 'Has been invited' → güncel → Present Perfect Passive. 'Comes once in a lifetime' → genel gerçek → Simple Present. 'Was described as transformative' → katılanların geçmiş değerlendirmesi → Simple Past Passive.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'was invited / came / was described' diyerek tümünü geçmişe çeker; davet güncel haberdir — Present Perfect gerekli.

questions.question: The manuscript ---- authenticated by three independent experts before it ---- to the national museum, where it ---- on permanent display.
options: A) had been / was donated / is now
B) was / had been donated / has been
C) had been / was donated / has been
D) had been / has been donated / is now
E) was / was donated / is now

feedback.hint: Doğrulama → bağış öncesinde. Bağış → geçmiş. Sergi → şimdiki durum.
feedback.logic: Doğrulama bağıştan önce tamamlandı → Past Perfect Passive: 'had been authenticated'. Bağış → Simple Past Passive: 'was donated'. Şimdiki sergi → Simple Present: 'is now on display'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'has been' diyerek sergiyi Present Perfect yapar; 'on permanent display' süregelen mevcut durum → Simple Present daha doğal.

questions.question: Experts predict that single-use plastics ---- entirely ---- from retail packaging across most of the developed world within the next fifteen years.

feedback.hint: 'Within the next fifteen years' → gelecekte tamamlanmış. Pasif yapı.
feedback.logic: 'Within the next fifteen years' → Future Perfect Passive: 'will have been eliminated'. Tamamlanmış gelecek eylem.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'will be eliminated' diyerek Simple Future Passive kullanır; 'within fifteen years' tamamlanmayı vurgular → Future Perfect gerekli.

questions.question: The athlete's world record ---- broken twice this year, yet her most remarkable achievement ---- considered by coaches to be her mental resilience under pressure.

feedback.hint: 'This year' → Present Perfect. 'Is considered' → şimdiki genel değerlendirme.
feedback.logic: 'This year' → Present Perfect Passive: 'has been broken'. 'Is considered by coaches to be' → stative genel değerlendirme → Simple Present Passive.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'has been considered' diyerek değerlendirmeyi de Present Perfect yapar; koçların kalıcı görüşü → stative Simple Present Passive daha doğal.

questions.question: ---- the research team ---- the funding application before the deadline, the project ---- operational six months earlier.
options: A) Had / submitted / would have become
D) Were / to submit / would have become

feedback.hint: Inverted Type 3. 'Would have become operational' → geçmiş gerçekleşmemiş sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'Had the team submitted' → Past Perfect inverted (Type 3). 'Would have become operational six months earlier' → Type 3 sonuç.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'would become' diyerek Type 2 sonuç verir; 'had submitted' geçmişe sabitler → Type 3, 'would have become' gerekli.

questions.question: I wish my school ---- more emphasis on creative problem-solving; I ---- far better prepared for the real-world challenges I now face.
options: A) had placed / would have been
D) would place / would have been

feedback.hint: 'I wish my school placed' → mevcut duruma pişmanlık mı, geçmişe mi? 'I now face' → şimdiki bağlam.
feedback.logic: 'Wish' + mevcut duruma pişmanlık (okul hâlâ öyle değil) → Simple Past: 'placed'. 'I now face challenges' şimdiki → Type 2 sonuç: 'would be'.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'had placed / would have been' diyerek geçmiş pişmanlık + Type 3 kurar; 'I now face' şimdiki durumu gösterir — Type 2 sonuç gerekli.

questions.question: If the city's public transport network ---- more efficiently, fewer residents ---- on private vehicles and carbon emissions ---- significantly lower.
options: A) operated / would rely / would be
B) had operated / would rely / would be
C) operates / will rely / will be
D) operated / would have relied / would be
E) were operating / would rely / are

feedback.hint: Mevcut gerçekliğe karşı hipotez → Type 2. Üç boşluk tutarlı olmalı.
feedback.logic: Şimdiki gerçekliğe karşı hipotez → Type 2: 'operated / would rely / would be'. Tüm cümle aynı hipotetik düzlemde.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'had operated / would rely / would be' diyerek Mixed Conditional kurar; ancak bağlam tamamen şimdiki durum — Type 2 tutarlılığı gerektirir.

questions.question: She wishes the programme committee ---- her application ---- more carefully; the oversight ---- her an exceptional opportunity.
options: A) had reviewed / would not have cost
C) had reviewed / would not cost
D) would review / has not cost
E) reviewed / would not have cost

feedback.hint: 'I wish' + geçmiş pişmanlık. Sonuç da gerçekleşmemiş geçmiş.
feedback.logic: 'Wish' + geçmiş pişmanlık → Past Perfect: 'had reviewed'. Gerçekleşmemiş geçmiş sonuç → Type 3: 'would not have cost'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'had reviewed / would not cost' diyerek şimdiki sonuç verir; fırsat geçmişte kaçırıldı — Type 3, 'would not have cost' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- the renewable energy transition ---- faster, several coastal communities ---- the brunt of extreme weather events that have intensified due to climate inaction.
options: A) Had / proceeded / would not be bearing
B) Were / to proceed / would not bear
C) Had / proceeded / would not have borne
D) Should / proceed / will not bear
E) Had / proceeded / would not bear

feedback.hint: Geçmişte daha hızlı olsaydı + 'have intensified' → şimdiki etki devam ediyor. Mixed mi?
feedback.logic: 'Had the transition proceeded faster' → Past Perfect inverted (Type 3 koşul). 'Would not be bearing the brunt now' → şimdiki devam eden etki → Mixed: 'would not be bearing'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'would not have borne' diyerek Type 3 sonuç verir; topluluklar hâlâ aşırı hava olaylarına maruz kalıyor → Mixed, 'would not be bearing' gerekli.

questions.question: I wish my favourite author ---- a new series; the last trilogy ---- brilliantly and I ---- desperate for more stories in that world.
options: B) wrote / has ended / have been
D) were writing / has ended / am

feedback.hint: 'I wish' + şimdiki arzu. 'The last trilogy has ended' → bugüne uzanan gerçek. 'I am desperate' → şimdiki durum.
feedback.logic: 'Wish' + şimdiki arzu → Simple Past: 'wrote'... ama 'were writing' süregelen arzuyu daha iyi ifade eder. 'Has ended brilliantly' → Present Perfect (sonucu güncel). 'I am desperate' → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'were writing / ended / am' diyerek 'ended' Simple Past kullanır; trilojinin bitiş etkisi hâlâ hissediliyor → 'has ended' Present Perfect daha güçlü.

questions.question: Suppose a breakthrough in battery technology ---- within the next few years; the adoption of electric vehicles ---- exponentially.
options: D) were to occur / would accelerate

feedback.hint: 'Suppose' + 'within the next few years' → resmi gelecek hipotez.
feedback.logic: 'Were to occur' = 'suppose' + formal hypothetical future (Type 2). 'Would accelerate' = Type 2 sonuç.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'occurred / would accelerate' diyerek Type 2 kurar; bu da doğru ama 'suppose' + 'were to occur' daha resmi ve güçlü hipotetik bildirir.

questions.question: It is high time the education system ---- standardised testing as the primary measure of intelligence rather than ---- multiple forms of cognitive ability.

feedback.hint: 'It is high time + ...' → Simple Past subjunctive. 'Rather than + ...' → gerund.
feedback.logic: 'It is high time + Simple Past': 'abandoned'. 'Rather than + gerund': 'ignoring'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'abandoned / to ignore' diyerek 'rather than' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'rather than' edat → gerund gerektirir.

questions.question: If the local council ---- the community garden proposal three years ago, residents ---- access to green space and ---- a stronger sense of collective identity.
options: A) had approved / would have had / would have developed
B) approved / would have had / would develop
C) had approved / would have / would have developed
D) approved / would have / would have developed
E) had approved / would have had / would develop

feedback.hint: 'Three years ago' → geçmiş. Her iki sonuç da geçmişte gerçekleşmemiş → Type 3.
feedback.logic: Geçmişte yapılmamış eylem → Past Perfect: 'had approved'. Her iki sonuç da Type 3: 'would have had / would have developed'.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'would develop' diyerek ikinci sonucu Type 2 yapar; her iki sonuç da geçmiş bağlamda → Type 3 tutarlılığı gerekli.

questions.question: She wishes she ---- the feedback more gracefully in the moment; her defensive reaction ---- her relationship with the mentor unnecessarily.
options: C) had handled / would have strained

feedback.hint: 'I wish' + geçmiş pişmanlık. İlişki gerginliği → zaten gerçekleşmiş ve devam ediyor.
feedback.logic: 'Wish' + geçmiş pişmanlık → Past Perfect: 'had handled'. 'Has strained the relationship' = geçmişten bugüne uzanan gerçek etki → Present Perfect.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'would have strained' diyerek Type 3 sonuç verir; ilişki gerginliği zaten gerçekleşti ve devam ediyor — Present Perfect 'has strained' gerçeği aktarır.

questions.question: The committee insisted ---- all speakers ---- their presentations to fifteen minutes and ---- no Q&A session ---- held until all presentations were complete.

feedback.hint: 'Insisted that' → subjunctive. İki paralel talep, her ikisi de 'that' ile.
feedback.logic: 'Insist that + subjunctive': 'limit / be'. Her iki talep 'that' noun clause içinde.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı ikinci 'that'ı düşürür; formal bağlamda paralel taleplerde 'that' tutarlılığı korur.

questions.question: The psychologist pointed out ---- teenagers ---- to social comparison on digital platforms ---- a significantly higher rate of self-reported anxiety than those who are not.

feedback.hint: 'Pointed out that' → olgusal noun clause. 'Teenagers exposed to comparison' → pasif participial. Genel gerçek.
feedback.logic: 'Pointed out that' → 'that' olgusal bağlaç. 'Teenagers exposed to social comparison' → past participial (pasif). 'Exhibit a higher rate' → genel gerçek → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'exhibited' diyerek Simple Past kullanır; genel bilimsel bulgu kalıcı gerçek → Simple Present gerekli.

questions.question: It is widely ---- that access to clean water ---- not merely a development issue but a fundamental human right ---- cannot be compromised.

feedback.hint: 'It is widely recognised that' → impersonal passive + noun clause. 'A right that cannot' → defining relative.
feedback.logic: 'It is widely recognised that access is' → impersonal passive + noun clause. 'A fundamental right that cannot be compromised' → defining subject: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'which' diyerek defining bağlamda 'which' kullanır; 'a right which' yerine 'a right that' defining bağlamda daha standart.

questions.question: The judge instructed the jury ---- they ---- the evidence objectively and ---- to reach a verdict until all testimony ---- been heard.
options: A) that / must weigh / not attempt / had
B) whether / should weigh / not to attempt / has
D) that / weigh / not attempt / has
E) that / should weigh / not to attempt / had

feedback.hint: 'Instructed that' → backshift + subjunctive. 'Not to attempt' → infinitive olumsuzluk. 'Until all testimony had been heard' → Past Perfect.
feedback.logic: 'Instructed that they must weigh' → modal → backshift yok ('must' sabit). 'Not to attempt' → olumsuz infinitive. 'Until testimony had been heard' → önceden tamamlanmış → Past Perfect.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'not attempt' diyerek 'not + base form' kullanır; 'instructed + not to attempt' infinitive yapısı gerektirir — 'not to attempt'.

questions.question: ---- distinguishes truly exceptional leaders from competent managers is ---- they respond when circumstances are most unpredictable.

feedback.hint: İlk: özne free relative. İkinci: 'respond' → biçim sorusu.
feedback.logic: 'What distinguishes exceptional leaders' → subject noun clause. 'Is how they respond' → 'how' biçim/yöntem noun clause.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'that' diyerek 'is that they respond' kurar; 'that' olgusal bildirim → burada 'nasıl davrandıkları' soruluyor, 'how' gerekli.

questions.question: The mentor encouraged her mentee ---- that failure ---- a natural part of mastery and ---- to catastrophise setbacks.
options: C) to accept / was / not to
D) to accept / is / not to

feedback.hint: 'Encourage + object + ...' yapısı. 'Not to catastrophise' → olumsuz infinitive.
feedback.logic: 'Encourage + object + infinitive': 'to accept'. 'That failure is a natural part' → genel gerçek noun clause → Simple Present. 'Not to catastrophise' → olumsuz infinitive.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'was' diyerek backshift yapar; 'encouraged' reporting verb gerektirse de 'failure is a natural part' kalıcı gerçek → Simple Present korunur.

questions.question: The survey revealed ---- over eighty percent of respondents ---- that their schools ---- them with adequate tools for managing academic pressure.
options: A) that / felt / had not provided
B) whether / feel / have not provided
C) that / felt / did not provide
D) that / had felt / had not provided
E) how / felt / had not provided

feedback.hint: 'Revealed that' → backshift. 'Had not provided' → araç eksikliği anketten önce de vardı.
feedback.logic: 'Revealed that they felt' → backshift: 'feel → felt'. 'That schools had not provided tools' → okul deneyimi zaman önceden → Past Perfect.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'did not provide' diyerek Simple Past backshift kullanır; araç eksikliği okul boyunca devam eden durum → Past Perfect 'had not provided' daha güçlü.

questions.question: ---- remains most controversial about social media algorithms is ---- they prioritise engagement over user wellbeing, often ---- harmful content.

feedback.hint: İlk: özne noun clause. İkinci: 'is that' → olgusal bildirim. Üçüncü: eş zamanlı süreç.
feedback.logic: 'What remains most controversial' → subject noun clause. 'Is that they prioritise' → olgusal: 'that'. 'Often amplifying harmful content' → eş zamanlı süreç participial.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'to amplify' diyerek infinitive kullanır; 'amplifying' participial eş zamanlılığı ifade eder — 'to amplify' amaç bildirir.

questions.question: The career counsellor suggested ---- the student ---- a portfolio of diverse projects and ---- at least two professionals from different sectors before making a final decision.

feedback.hint: 'Suggested that' → subjunctive. İki paralel base form.
feedback.logic: 'Suggest that + subjunctive (base form)': 'compile / consult'. Her iki eylem paralel.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'compiles / consults' diyerek üçüncü tekil kişi -s eki kullanır; subjunctive yapısında -s eki kullanılmaz.

questions.question: Many young people struggle to articulate ---- the pressure to succeed academically ---- their relationship with learning, and ---- they begin to dread rather than embrace intellectual challenge.

feedback.hint: İlk: nasıl etkilediği. İkinci: genel gerçek. Üçüncü: ne zaman dread oluyor?
feedback.logic: 'Articulate how pressure undermines their relationship' → 'how' biçim noun clause + Simple Present. 'And when they begin to dread' → zaman noun clause.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'how / undermines / how' diyerek üçüncü boşluğa 'how' koyar; 'how they begin to dread' biçim sorusu değil — ne zaman dreading başladığı soruluyor: 'when'.

questions.question: The young writer found herself ---- a story that ---- told from the perspective of multiple unreliable narrators, which meant ---- dozens of competing voices in her head.
options: B) to craft / demanded / to manage

feedback.hint: 'Find herself + ...' yapısı. 'Meant + ...' yapısı.
feedback.logic: 'Found herself + gerund': 'crafting'. 'Demanded' → Simple Past. 'Meant + gerund': 'managing'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'to manage' diyerek 'mean' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'mean + gerund' = 'imply/involve doing something' — 'mean + infinitive' = 'intend'.

questions.question: The festival is worth ---- at least once in your lifetime, as it offers ---- some of the most authentic folk music traditions ---- anywhere in Europe.
options: A) attending / the chance to witness / found
B) to attend / the chance of witnessing / found
C) attending / the chance to witness / finding
D) to attend / a chance to witness / found
E) attending / a chance of witnessing / found

feedback.hint: 'Worth + ...' yapısı. 'The chance to + ...' → infinitive. 'Found anywhere' → pasif participial.
feedback.logic: 'Worth + gerund': 'attending'. 'The chance to witness' → 'chance + infinitive'. 'Found anywhere in Europe' → pasif participial (reducing relative clause).
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'a chance of witnessing' diyerek 'chance of + gerund' kullanır; 'chance to + infinitive' = opportunity — daha standart.

questions.question: He deeply regrets ---- the chance to study abroad when it was offered and now finds it difficult ---- a career path that truly excites him.

feedback.hint: 'Regret + ...' → geçmişte kaçırılan fırsat. 'Find it difficult + ...' yapısı.
feedback.logic: 'Regrets having missed' = perfect gerund (geçmişte kaçırılan). 'Finds it difficult to identify' = 'find it + adj + infinitive'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'having missed / identifying' diyerek 'find it difficult' ardından gerund kullanır; 'find it + adjective + infinitive' sabit yapı — 'to identify' gerekli.

questions.question: The foundation's annual report proposes ---- youth sports clubs in underserved communities, ---- that physical activity is most transformative when access is equitable.

feedback.hint: 'Propose + ...' (British English). İkinci boşluk: eş zamanlı argüman.
feedback.logic: 'Propose + gerund' (British English): 'funding'. 'Arguing that access is equitable' → eş zamanlı argüman participial phrase.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'funding / to argue' diyerek 'to argue' infinitive kullanır; 'arguing' participial eş zamanlılığı ifade eder — 'to argue' amaç bildirir.

questions.question: The teenage entrepreneur went on ---- a second business after ---- her first venture profitably, demonstrating an unusual appetite for calculated risk.
options: E) to launch / having been sold

feedback.hint: 'Go on + infinitive' → farklı bir eyleme geçiş. 'After + ...' → edat + geçmişe atıf.
feedback.logic: 'Go on + infinitive' = başka bir şey yapmaya geçmek: 'to launch'. 'After + perfect gerund': 'having sold' (önce satış, sonra yeni girişim).
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'selling' diyerek basit gerund kullanır; satış yeni girişimden önce tamamlandı → perfect gerund 'having sold' kronolojik önceliği vurgular.

questions.question: There is considerable merit in ---- digital media consumption as a structured subject in schools rather than ---- young people to navigate it entirely on their own.

feedback.hint: 'Merit in + ...' → edat tamlaması. 'Rather than + ...' → edat.
feedback.logic: 'There is merit in + gerund': 'teaching'. 'Rather than + gerund': 'leaving'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'teaching / to leave' diyerek 'rather than' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'rather than' edat → gerund gerektirir.

questions.question: The intern admitted ---- the deadline and ---- to notify her supervisor in time, a combination of errors that ---- the entire project.
options: B) to miss / to fail / jeopardised
C) having missed / having failed / jeopardised
E) having missed / failing / has jeopardised

feedback.hint: 'Admit + ...' → geçmişe itiraf. 'A combination that jeopardised' → geçmiş sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'Admitted having missed / having failed' → iki geçmiş eylem → perfect gerund. 'Jeopardised the project' → Simple Past.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'missing / failing' diyerek basit gerund kullanır; itirafın konusu itiraftan önce gerçekleşmişti → perfect gerund 'having missed / having failed' daha güçlü.

questions.question: The documentary maker spent two years ---- rare archival footage, only ---- that the most critical reels ---- in a warehouse fire twenty years earlier.
options: A) sourcing / to discover / had been destroyed
B) to source / discovering / were destroyed
C) sourcing / discovering / had been destroyed
D) sourcing / to discover / were destroyed
E) to source / to discover / had been destroyed

feedback.hint: 'Spend time + ...' yapısı. 'Only to + infinitive' → beklenmedik keşif. 'Twenty years earlier' → daha da önce.
feedback.logic: 'Spent two years + gerund': 'sourcing'. 'Only to discover' → beklenmedik hayal kırıklığı. 'Had been destroyed twenty years earlier' → filmlerin yokluğu keşiften çok önce → Past Perfect Passive.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'were destroyed' diyerek Simple Past kullanır; yirmi yıl önce yaşanan olayın kronolojik önceliği → Past Perfect gerekli.

questions.question: She is determined ---- a formal complaint against the school's handling of the incident, ---- every piece of evidence she has compiled.

feedback.hint: 'Determined + ...' yapısı. İkinci boşluk: eş zamanlı delil sunma — participial.
feedback.logic: 'Determined + infinitive': 'to file'. 'Citing every piece of evidence' → eş zamanlı yöntem participial phrase.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'to file / to cite' diyerek 'to cite' infinitive kullanır; 'citing' participial eş zamanlılığı ifade eder — 'to cite' amaç bildirir.

questions.question: Most creative professionals acknowledge ---- mistakes as ---- part of the process, rather than ---- them as evidence of incompetence.
options: B) to make / an inevitable / to treat
E) making / an inevitable / to treat

feedback.hint: 'Acknowledge + ...' yapısı. 'An inevitable part' → artikel. 'Rather than + ...' → gerund.
feedback.logic: 'Acknowledge + gerund': 'making'. 'An inevitable part' → belirsiz tekil → 'an'. 'Rather than + gerund': 'treating'.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'to treat' diyerek 'rather than' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'rather than' edat → gerund gerektirir.

questions.question: The independent bookshop, ---- owner has refused to sell out to a large retail chain, has become a cultural hub ---- the local community gathers.

feedback.hint: İyelik: 'kitapçının sahibi'. 'A cultural hub where' → yer zarflığı.
feedback.logic: 'Whose owner has refused' → iyelik. 'A cultural hub where the community gathers' → zarflık: 'where'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'in which' diyerek resmi ama ağır bir yapı kurar; 'where' doğal ve tercih edilen — her ikisi dilbilgisel doğru.

questions.question: The research institution at ---- she has been based for the past three years has recently ---- awarded a major grant to expand its climate research division.

feedback.hint: 'Based at' → preposition. 'Has recently been awarded' → Present Perfect Passive.
feedback.logic: 'At which she has been based' → 'based at + object' → 'at which'. 'Has recently been awarded' → Present Perfect Passive.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'that / been' diyerek 'at that' kullanır; preposition + 'that' resmi İngilizcede yasak — 'at which' zorunlu.

questions.question: The year ---- the band released their debut album was also the year ---- they performed at their hometown festival for the very last time.

feedback.hint: 'The year when' → zaman zarflığı. Paralel yapı.
feedback.logic: 'The year when they released' + 'the year when they performed' → her ikisi de zarflık 'when' → paralel.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'when / in which' diyerek farklı yapılar kullanır; paraleli korumak için her iki boşluk da 'when' olmalı.

questions.question: The only strategy ---- consistently produces long-term behavioural change is one ---- combines gradual habit formation with meaningful intrinsic motivation.

feedback.hint: 'The only strategy' → defining. 'One that combines' → defining.
feedback.logic: 'The only strategy that produces' → 'only' + defining → 'that'. 'One that combines' → defining subject: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'which / that' diyerek 'which produces' kullanır; 'the only' + defining bağlamda 'that' daha standart.

questions.question: The platform, ---- design has been criticised for exploiting psychological vulnerabilities, now faces regulatory scrutiny in several countries, ---- is likely to result in sweeping reforms.

feedback.hint: İyelik: 'platformun tasarımı'. İkinci: tüm önceki cümleye atıf.
feedback.logic: 'Whose design has been criticised' → iyelik. İkinci boşluk: tüm cümleye atıf → non-defining → 'which'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'that' diyerek non-defining bağlamda kullanım hatası yapar; virgüllü non-defining clause 'that' alamaz.

questions.question: The concept of 'slow journalism,' ---- prioritises depth over speed, has attracted a growing readership among people ---- are disillusioned with the 24-hour news cycle.

feedback.hint: Virgüllü non-defining. İkinci: 'people who' → kişiler.
feedback.logic: 'Slow journalism, which prioritises depth' → non-defining: 'which'. 'People who are disillusioned' → kişiler: 'who'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'which / that' diyerek 'people that' kullanır; 'that' da mümkün ama 'people who' daha doğal — sınav bağlamında 'who' tercih edilir.

questions.question: The innovation ---- the startup is best known is a low-cost diagnostic device ---- can detect early-stage infections without laboratory equipment.

feedback.hint: 'Known for' → preposition. 'A device that can detect' → defining subject.
feedback.logic: 'The innovation for which the startup is best known' → 'known for + object' → 'for which'. 'A device that can detect' → defining subject: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'which / that' diyerek 'which the startup is best known' kullanır; 'known for' bağımlı preposition → 'for which' zorunlu.

questions.question: ---- created the first social media algorithm ---- enabled personalised content delivery fundamentally changed how information ---- across global networks.

feedback.hint: 'Whoever created' → özne free relative. 'Algorithm that enabled' → defining. 'How information spreads' → genel gerçek.
feedback.logic: 'Whoever created' = subject free relative. 'Algorithm that enabled' → defining subject: 'that'. 'How information spreads' → genel gerçek → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'Whomever' diyerek nesne halini kullanır; 'created' fiilinin öznesi → özne hali 'whoever' gerekli.

questions.question: The school's wellbeing programme, ---- positive outcomes have been documented in thirty independent studies, is now ---- being rolled out nationally.

feedback.hint: 'Programın olumlu sonuçları' → iyelik. 'Being rolled out' → pasif süreç, artikel gerekmez.
feedback.logic: 'Whose positive outcomes have been documented' → iyelik. 'Being rolled out nationally' → pasif participial, belirli artikel gerekmez.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'the' diyerek 'being rolled out' önüne belirli artikel koyar; 'being rolled out' pasif participial, 'the' gerektirmez.

questions.question: The issue of online privacy is one ---- has generated considerable legislative debate and ---- young people feel most unprepared to navigate independently.

feedback.hint: 'One that has generated' → defining subject. 'And that young people feel' → defining object.
feedback.logic: 'One that has generated debate' → defining subject: 'that'. 'And that young people feel most unprepared to navigate' → defining object: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'that / which' diyerek 'which young people feel' kullanır; defining bağlamda 'that' daha standart — 'which' non-defining çağrışımı.

questions.question: ---- discovery of ---- ancient burial site beneath ---- shopping centre has prompted ---- urgent archaeological investigation.

feedback.hint: 'The discovery of' → belirli. 'An ancient burial site' → ünlü harf + ilk kez. 'The shopping centre' → belirli. 'An urgent investigation' → ünlü harf.
feedback.logic: 'The discovery of an ancient burial site' → belirli + ünlü harf + belirsiz. 'The shopping centre' → belirli. 'An urgent archaeological investigation' → 'u' ünlü → 'an'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'a ancient burial site' diyerek ünsüz harf kuralını uygular; 'ancient' ünlü harfle başlar → 'an' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- creativity and ---- critical thinking are increasingly cited as ---- most valuable skills in ---- rapidly changing job market.

feedback.hint: 'Creativity / critical thinking' → soyut genel. 'The most valuable' → superlative. 'A rapidly changing job market' → belirsiz.
feedback.logic: 'Creativity and critical thinking' → soyut genel → article yok. 'The most valuable skills' → superlative → 'the'. 'A rapidly changing job market' → belirsiz → 'a'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'the job market' diyerek belirli kullanır; genel anlamdaki iş piyasası → 'a rapidly changing job market' belirsiz.

questions.question: ---- neither of ---- two proposals met all the criteria, ---- independent arbitrator was appointed to mediate between ---- parties.
options: E) Given that / the / an / the

feedback.hint: 'As neither' → neden bağlacı. 'The two proposals' → belirli. 'An independent arbitrator' → ilk kez + ünlü. 'The parties' → belirli taraflar.
feedback.logic: 'As' → neden. 'The two proposals' → belirli. 'An independent arbitrator' → 'i' ünlü → 'an'. 'The parties' → önceden bahsedilen → 'the'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'a arbitrator' diyerek ünlü harf kuralını ihlal eder; 'arbitrator' 'a' ile başlar → 'an' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- amount of ---- scientific evidence linking ---- ultra-processed food to ---- poor cognitive outcomes in adolescents has reached ---- tipping point.
options: B) An / the / the / the / the

feedback.hint: 'The amount of scientific evidence' → belirli. 'Ultra-processed food / poor cognitive outcomes' → genel. 'A tipping point' → ilk kez.
feedback.logic: 'The amount of scientific evidence linking' → sıfat tamlaması → 'the'. 'Ultra-processed food / poor cognitive outcomes' → genel → article yok. 'A tipping point' → belirsiz → 'a'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'the poor cognitive outcomes' diyerek genel kavrama 'the' koyar; genel araştırma bağlamı → article yok.

questions.question: She is ---- most gifted student I have taught in ---- twenty-year career, and ---- potential she demonstrates goes far beyond what ---- conventional testing can measure.

feedback.hint: 'The most gifted' → superlative. 'A twenty-year career' → belirsiz. 'The potential she demonstrates' → sıfat tamlaması. 'Conventional testing' → genel.
feedback.logic: 'The most gifted student' → superlative → 'the'. 'A twenty-year career' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'The potential she demonstrates' → sıfat tamlaması → 'the'. 'Conventional testing' → genel → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'the twenty-year career' diyerek belirli kullanır; ilk kez bahsedilen belirsiz kariyer → 'a' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- growing recognition that ---- emotional intelligence is ---- teachable skill has led to ---- paradigm shift in how ---- character education is approached.
options: B) The / the / a / a / the

feedback.hint: 'A growing recognition' → ilk kez. 'Emotional intelligence' → soyut genel. 'A teachable skill' → ilk kez. 'A paradigm shift' → ilk kez. 'Character education' → genel.
feedback.logic: 'A growing recognition' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'Emotional intelligence' → soyut genel → article yok. 'A teachable skill' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'A paradigm shift' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'Character education' → genel → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'The growing recognition / the emotional intelligence' diyerek genel kavramlara 'the' koyar; genel soyut kavramlar → article yok.

questions.question: ---- majority of studies conducted on ---- effects of ---- screen time indicate that ---- correlation exists but that ---- causation remains difficult to establish.
options: D) The / the / the / a / a

feedback.hint: 'The majority of studies' → belirli. 'The effects of screen time' → belirli kavram. 'Screen time' → genel. 'A correlation' → ilk kez. 'Causation' → genel soyut.
feedback.logic: 'The majority of studies' → belirli. 'The effects of screen time' → 'the' + genel (screen time). 'A correlation exists' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'Causation' → soyut genel → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'a causation' diyerek soyut genel kavrama belirsiz artikel koyar; 'causation' sayılamaz genel → article yok.

questions.question: It takes ---- extraordinary level of self-discipline to pursue ---- mastery in any ---- field without ---- external validation during ---- early stages.
options: B) the / the / a / an / the

feedback.hint: 'An extraordinary level' → ünlü. 'Mastery / external validation' → soyut genel. 'The early stages' → belirli.
feedback.logic: 'An extraordinary level' → 'e' ünlü → 'an'. 'Mastery / any field / external validation' → genel → article yok. 'The early stages' → belirli (ima edilen aşamalar) → 'the'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'an / - / - / the / -' diyerek 'external validation' önüne 'the' koyar; genel soyut → article yok.

questions.question: ---- notion that ---- academic success alone guarantees ---- fulfilling life has been challenged by ---- growing body of ---- research into ---- happiness.
options: B) A / the / the / the / the / -

feedback.hint: 'The notion that' → belirli. 'Academic success / fulfilling life / research / happiness' → genel.
feedback.logic: 'The notion that' → belirli → 'the'. 'Academic success' → genel → article yok. 'A fulfilling life' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'A growing body of research into happiness' → 'a growing body' belirsiz → 'a'; 'research / happiness' genel → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'the growing body' diyerek belirli kullanır; daha önce bahsedilmemiş araştırma kütlesi → 'a' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- experience of performing in front of ---- live audience for ---- first time is ---- uniquely transformative one that few performers ever forget.

feedback.hint: 'The experience of performing' → sıfat tamlaması. 'A live audience' → belirsiz. 'The first time' → sabit deyim. 'A uniquely transformative one' → ilk kez.
feedback.logic: 'The experience of performing' → sıfat tamlaması → 'the'. 'A live audience' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'The first time' → sabit deyim → 'the'. 'A uniquely transformative one' → belirsiz → 'a'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'the live audience' diyerek belirsiz izleyiciyi belirli yapar; herhangi bir canlı izleyici → 'a' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- her initial scepticism about online learning, she completed the course with distinction, ---- that dedication can overcome even the most resistant starting positions.

feedback.hint: 'Scepticism' → isim öbeği. 'Demonstrating that' → eylemin sonucu bildiren participial.
feedback.logic: 'Notwithstanding her initial scepticism' → resmi edat + isim öbeği. 'Demonstrating that dedication can overcome' → eylemin sonucu participial phrase.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'demonstrated' diyerek Simple Past kullanır; 'demonstrated' bağımsız fiil olur — participial phrase için gerund 'demonstrating' gerekli.

questions.question: The policy has attracted criticism from ---- community leaders ---- academic researchers, ---- it appears to have been designed without adequate consultation.

feedback.hint: 'Both... and' → iki grup. 'As' → neden bağlacı.
feedback.logic: 'Both community leaders and academic researchers' → eşleştirici. 'As it appears to have been designed without consultation' → neden bağlacı.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'not only / but also / as' diyerek 'not only community leaders but also academic researchers' kurar; dilbilgisel doğru ama 'both... and' daha doğal iki eşit grup için.

questions.question: The school introduced a mindfulness programme ---- reducing anxiety ---- improving academic focus, ---- the long-term outcomes remain inconclusive.
options: B) aiming at / but also / however
E) aimed at / as well as / though

feedback.hint: 'Aimed at + gerund' → edat tamlaması. 'As well as' → ek hedef. 'Though / although' → zıtlık.
feedback.logic: 'Aimed at reducing anxiety as well as improving academic focus' → iki hedef. 'Though the long-term outcomes remain inconclusive' → zıtlık — 'though' cümle sonu/virgülden sonra doğal.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'although' diyerek cümle başı bağlacı kullanır; virgülden sonra 'though' (cümle sonu zıtlığı) daha doğal — her ikisi kabul edilebilir, E daha akıcı.

questions.question: ---- the scientific consensus on climate change is clear, public understanding of its mechanisms remains ---- limited ---- many individuals still question its anthropogenic origins.

feedback.hint: 'While + full clause' → kısmi zıtlık. 'So + adj + that' → sonuç bildirimi.
feedback.logic: 'While the consensus is clear' → kısmi zıtlık. 'So limited that many individuals still question' → 'so + adj + that' degree result.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'too + that' diyerek 'too... that' yapısını kurar; standart yapı 'too + adj + to + infinitive' — 'that' ile kullanılmaz.

questions.question: The report concluded ---- the problem ---- systemic rather than individual, ---- calling for structural reform at the institutional level.

feedback.hint: 'Concluded that' → backshift. 'Thereby calling for' → eylemin mantıksal sonucu.
feedback.logic: 'Concluded that the problem was' → backshift: 'is → was'. 'Thereby calling for structural reform' → sonuç participial phrase.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'is' diyerek backshift yapmaz; 'concluded' geçmiş reporting verb → backshift gerektirir.

questions.question: ---- the financial risks involved, the young entrepreneur pressed ahead with her business plan, ---- that calculated boldness is what separates successful founders from perpetual planners.
options: C) Although aware of / however believing
D) Fully aware of / to believe

feedback.hint: İlk: 'risks'i bilen participial yapısı. İkinci: eş zamanlı inanç — participial.
feedback.logic: 'Fully aware of the financial risks' → participial phrase (concessive). 'Believing that boldness separates' → eş zamanlı inanç participial.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'Notwithstanding / believing' diyerek 'notwithstanding' kullanır; 'notwithstanding' edat olarak 'the risks' alır ama 'fully aware of' participial bağlamı daha güçlü ifade eder.

questions.question: The mentorship programme has proven valuable ---- for the mentees, ---- for the mentors ---- report significant gains in leadership and communication skills.
options: A) not only / but also / who
C) not only / but also / that
E) not only / but also / which

feedback.hint: 'Not only... but also' → paralel. 'Mentors who report' → defining.
feedback.logic: 'Not only for the mentees but also for the mentors' → parallel prepositional. 'Mentors who report significant gains' → defining subject: 'who'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'that' diyerek 'mentors that report' kullanır; kişiler için 'who' daha doğal — 'that' da dilbilgisel mümkün ama 'who' tercih edilir.

questions.question: ---- the grant funding was insufficient, the community arts project ---- succeeded in completing its first phase, ---- largely on volunteer labour and in-kind donations.
options: C) Even though / nonetheless / to rely

feedback.hint: 'Although + full clause' → zıtlık. 'Nonetheless' → bağımsız pekiştirme zarfı. 'Relying on' → eş zamanlı yöntem.
feedback.logic: 'Although the funding was insufficient' → tam cümle zıtlık. 'Nonetheless succeeded' → buna rağmen başardı. 'Relying largely on volunteer labour' → eş zamanlı yöntem participial.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'to rely' diyerek infinitive kullanır; 'relying' participial eş zamanlı yöntemi ifade eder — 'to rely' amaç bildirir.

questions.question: The film was ---- critically acclaimed ---- commercially successful; ----, it has since become ---- regarded as one of the defining works of its era.
options: C) not only / but also / however / generally

feedback.hint: 'Both... and' → iki özellik. Noktalı virgül + pekiştirme zarfı. 'Widely regarded' → akademik deyim.
feedback.logic: 'Both critically acclaimed and commercially successful' → eşleştirici. 'Indeed, it has since become widely regarded' → pekiştirme: 'indeed'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'consequently' diyerek mantıksal sonuç bildirir; 'indeed' pekiştirme/doğrulamayı daha uygun ifade eder.

questions.question: The youth forum brought together participants from ---- backgrounds, ---- fostering dialogue across social and economic divides that ---- rarely bridged in everyday life.

feedback.hint: 'Diverse backgrounds' → akademik tercih. 'Thereby fostering' → participial sonuç. 'Divides that are rarely bridged' → genel gerçek.
feedback.logic: 'Diverse backgrounds' → akademik bağlamda 'diverse' tercih edilir. 'Thereby fostering dialogue' → eylemin sonucu. 'Divides that are rarely bridged in everyday life' → genel gerçek → Simple Present: 'are'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'were' diyerek genel gerçeği geçmişe çeker; 'in everyday life' kalıcı gerçeği işaret eder → Simple Present 'are' gerekli.
